name: okpack-sec-feed-fetch
prompt: okpack-sec feed pull: fetch the security OPML into raw/sec/ for the ingest lane. Pure script, wakeAgent=false.

name: okpack-sec-threat-brief
prompt: Daily security brief. Your FIRST response MUST be a tool call: file_read on /opt/vault/wiki/HOT.md (the derived load-first set: recent sources, recently-updated entities, open predictions). Then write today's brief to /opt/vault/wiki/briefings/<YYYY-MM-DD>.md (frontmatter: type: dashboard, title, published: <YYYY-MM-DD> — published drives tier recency) summarizing the 3-5 most significant developments (new campaigns / actors / exploited CVEs / notable techniques), each 2-3 sentences with [[wikilinks]] to the entities + their source. Analyst-grade and terse; skip 101 explanation. LOCAL-ONLY: do not use web tools. Write each [[wikilink]] as [[entities/<first-letter>/<slug>|Display]] (entity pages live under entities/, sharded by the slug's first letter) and ONLY link pages you've confirmed exist via the okengine read tools — do not construct a path from the name/type. A no_agent pass (okpack-sec-brief-linkfix) also normalizes/repairs these links after you write.

name: okpack-sec-attack-import
prompt: Import the MITRE ATT&CK catalog (techniques + threat-actor groups) as canonical attack-pattern/intrusion-set pages. Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.

name: okpack-sec-kev-import
prompt: Flag CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (actively-exploited) on vulnerability pages. Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.

name: okpack-sec-nvd-import
prompt: Enrich vulnerability pages with NVD CVSS/CWE (bounded: recent window). Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.

name: okpack-sec-tgc-import
prompt: Import ThaiCERT Threat Group Cards — enrich/expand intrusion-set pages. Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.

name: okpack-sec-tgc-tools-import
prompt: Import ThaiCERT Threat Group Cards (Tools) — enrich/expand malware + tool pages. Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.

name: okpack-sec-msft-import
prompt: Import the Microsoft / Rosetta Stone threat-actor mapping as per-source intrusion-set observation records (cross-vendor alias backbone). Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.

name: okpack-sec-attack-refs-import
prompt: Mint citing source pages from each MITRE ATT&CK group's reference bibliography (Admiralty-scored provenance backbone for actor enrichment). Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.

name: okpack-sec-brief-linkfix
prompt: okpack-sec brief link repair: normalize wikilinks in wiki/briefings/ to verified canonical entity paths (resolve by slug/mitre_id/cve_id) and demote dead links to text — no broken links in a published brief.
